---
# AUTOGENERATED from @docker-doctor/core by scripts/generate-rules-doc.ts.
# Do not edit by hand ‚Äî run `bun run docs:rules` to regenerate.
title: Rules
description: Every rule docker-doctor ships, grouped by category.
---

docker-doctor ships 25 rules across 5 categories. Every diagnostic carries a full rule key (e.g. `docker-doctor/no-root-user`) that you can pass to `rules explain` or use to tune severity in your config.

List everything docker-doctor knows about:

```bash
npx @docker-doctor/cli@latest rules list
```

Explain any single rule in depth:

```bash
npx @docker-doctor/cli@latest rules explain <rule>
```

## Security

Catches Dockerfile patterns that widen your attack surface.

- `docker-doctor/no-root-user` ‚Äî Container should not run as root user _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/no-secrets-in-env` ‚Äî Do not store secrets in ENV or ARG instructions _(error)_
- `docker-doctor/pin-image-version` ‚Äî Always pin base image versions to specific tags _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/no-add-remote` ‚Äî Avoid using ADD with remote URLs _(warning)_

## Performance

Reduces build time and layer bloat.

- `docker-doctor/use-multi-stage` ‚Äî Consider using multi-stage builds _(info)_
- `docker-doctor/order-layers` ‚Äî Order layers to maximize build cache utility _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/minimize-layers` ‚Äî Minimize the number of image layers _(info)_
- `docker-doctor/use-dockerignore` ‚Äî Ensure .dockerignore is used _(warning)_

## Best Practices

General Dockerfile and Compose hygiene.

- `docker-doctor/require-healthcheck` ‚Äî Add a HEALTHCHECK instruction _(info)_
- `docker-doctor/prefer-copy-over-add` ‚Äî Prefer COPY over ADD _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/use-exec-form` ‚Äî Use exec form for CMD and ENTRYPOINT _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/require-labels` ‚Äî Add LABEL metadata to images _(info)_
- `docker-doctor/combine-apt-update-install` ‚Äî Combine apt-get update and apt-get install _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/use-pipefail` ‚Äî Use pipefail to catch pipeline command failures _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/absolute-workdir` ‚Äî Use absolute paths for WORKDIR _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/avoid-run-cd` ‚Äî Avoid changing directories with cd in RUN _(info)_
- `docker-doctor/sort-multiline-args` ‚Äî Sort multi-line arguments alphanumerically _(info)_
- `docker-doctor/useradd-no-log-init` ‚Äî Use --no-log-init with useradd _(warning)_

## Compose

Docker Compose-specific checks.

- `docker-doctor/no-version-key` ‚Äî Remove the 'version' key from Compose file _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/require-resource-limits` ‚Äî Define resource limits for services _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/require-restart-policy` ‚Äî Set restart policy for services _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/use-depends-on-condition` ‚Äî Use long-form depends*on with healthcheck conditions *(info)\_

## Image Size

Keeps final images small.

- `docker-doctor/prefer-slim-base` ‚Äî Use slim, alpine, or distroless base images _(info)_
- `docker-doctor/clean-package-cache` ‚Äî Clean up package manager cache in the same RUN layer _(warning)_
- `docker-doctor/avoid-dev-dependencies` ‚Äî Avoid installing development dependencies in final production stage _(warning)_

See [Configuration](/docs/reference/configuration) to change a rule's severity or turn off a whole category.
